calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default prove-up as to defendant 3 Brothers Construction and Short Cause trial as to Defendant Alex Jones.

Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. FTR commencing at 09:46 and ending at 10:30:00. (D505)

Craig Wallace, Esq. appearing for and with Wickman Development and Construction represented by Jonathan Wickman.

Jonathan Wickman is placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by Defendants 3 Brothers Electric and Alex Jones.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract filed on Oct-12-2021
Default entered as to 3 Brothers Electric filed on 5/25/22.
The Court finds defendant was properly noticed and takes judicial notice of the 8/22/22 time and place of trial by Judge Feng, and that proof of service to Alex Jones was effectuated on Mar-07-23.
EXHIBITS ADMITTED
Exhibit 4- Submitted
Exhibit 3 - Certification of forfeiture (OLSC Action)
Exhibit 5 - Decisions following the hearing (penalties dropped $179,000.)
Exhibit 6 - Letter from the City, showing Wickmen losses
Exhibit 7 - Letter from Attorney showing origin of $158,616.46 amount.
Exhibit 2 - Subcontract agreement (pg 205, and sub Exhibit A 2nd page)

The Court finds that through testimony, review of evidence, admitted exhibits, and good cause appearing that each element of Breach of (Sub) Contract of 3 Brother Electric and Alex Jones has been met specifically, and rules in favor of plaintiff Wickman Development and Construction.

Damages $179,022.71
Interest
Prejudgment 9/21/21 --- 4/5/23 $28,055.07
Costs $1551.10.00
Attorney Fees $10,000.00
Total $218,628.88
Proposed Judgment to be prepared by the prevailing party for review and approval by the Court. (D505)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Three Brothers Electrical Contractors and Alex Jones.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:31:04 p.m. and concluding at 01:44:43 p.m.

Plaintiff Wickman Development and Construction represented by Craig Wallace, Esq.
Defendant Three Brothers Electrical Contractors not appearing.
Defendant Alex Jones not appearing.

JONATHAN WICKMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff is examined by the Court regarding status and appearance of Defendant.

Proof of Service filed Dec-21-2021 and reflect service of summons and complaint on Defendants on December 13, 2021. Defendant Three Brothers Electrical Contractors did not respond. Default as to Defendant Three Brothers Electrical Contractors entered May-25-2022.

Defendant Alex Jones' Answer filed Mar-10-2022.
Notice of Time and Place for Trial setting trial this date, filed and sent to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant Alex Jones on Aug-08-2022. Defendant did not appear.

Court finds that Plaintiff's prayer for relief does not indicate amount it seeks in damages. Statement of Damages has not been filed.

Court orders matter continued to Apr-05-2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 505 for Plaintiff to serve and file statement of damages.
